nation: Conseil des Montagnais de Unamen Shipu
economic_notes: Entities include: Corporation de développement économique de Unamen Shipu (100%), Voyages Inter-Nations et Associés inc. (33.3%), Pêcherie Unamen Shipu s.e.c. (51%), Pourvoirie Étamamiou inc. (100%), Société Mukutan inc. (100%), Les Pêcheries Amik Unamen (50%), Innuvoyages inc. (100%), Hôtel Mme Ruby inc. (100%). Tourism, fishing, outfitter, and hotel operations present.
notes: Qualified audit opinion (opinion avec réserves) due to: (1) seven significant components not audited, accounted for at modified consolidation value; (2) Les Pêcheries Amik Unamen financial statements unavailable since December 2018; (3) Centre de santé Unamen Shipu health centre had no audited financials since April 2020; (4) non-compliance with SP 3280 on asset retirement obligations. Fiscal year is 2023 (ended March 31, 2023). Revenue calculated as sum of operating fund revenues + capital transfer revenues + other fund revenues. Expenses calculated as operating expenses + amortization. Prior year revenue/expenses calculated similarly from comparative figures. Restricted cash includes: encaisse-réserve 1006557 + encaisse-affectation 2409538 + water/sewer reserve 3019746 + AIC reserve 961502 + housing reserves (5270+2220147) = 7622760 approximately. Annual debt service = long-term debt repayment 686786 + lease obligation repayment 55510 = 742296. Remuneration schedule referenced on pages 252 and 254 but not included in extracted text.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
